violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The handle for the chest freezer by the door in the side storage room is missing. Tape was covering one hole, insulation was exposed on the other side. This is not a cleanable surface.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. Clean cutting boards, glasses, and food containers were stored on a cloth towel by the black stove in the kitchen.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Foam containers in the bar at the West end were not inverted.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
